overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban corridor at night. The player moves along wooden walkways and ascends stone stairs while encountering NPCs, with heavy atmospheric rain and teal neon lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked neon-lit pedestrian walkway with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden walkway through heavy rain, passing teal neon lights

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
wet wooden plank pathway reflecting teal neon lights
vertical cylindrical light posts emitting bright teal illumination
elevated highway or building structure visible through the rain above
tall trees and bushes lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, rain-soaked wooden walkway in a cyberpunk city at night. Teal neon light pillars line the right side while a graffiti-covered concrete wall runs along the left. Heavy rain creates reflections on the wet wooden planks, and elevated structures are visible overhead through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone stairway with graffiti artist

events.description: NPC in white shirt appears leaning against the graffiti wall on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway, approaching a stone stairway on the left

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt leaning against the graffiti wall, appearing to rest or observe

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending to the left with wet reflective steps

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the wooden walkway, passing an NPC leaning against the graffiti wall. A large stone stairway becomes visible on the left, leading upward into the city. The rain intensifies, creating ripples on the wet wooden surface.

events.description: camera turns left and begins ascending the stone stairs
passing character in yellow jacket descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: turning left and climbing the stone stairs, navigating around descending pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in bright yellow jacket descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete pathway at the top of the stairs continuing forward
modern glass building with illuminated windows visible above the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and ascends the wide stone stairway, leaving the wooden walkway behind. A character in a yellow jacket descends past the camera. Modern glass buildings with neon accents become visible above as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway through dense urban vegetation

events.description: reaching top of stairs and transitioning to upper walkway with denser vegetation

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the upper paved walkway, passing through denser vegetation

notable_agents.action: character in purple shirt walking ahead on the right side of the path

entered.detail: massive tree trunk with exposed roots blocking part of the right side
large boulders and rock outcroppings along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the camera continues along an elevated concrete walkway surrounded by dense vegetation and large trees. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric, with the character in purple walking ahead. Large rock formations and fallen logs line the path as the scene becomes more enclosed by nature.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk corridor that transitions from a neon-lit urban walkway into a dark, nature-overgrown elevated path. It begins on a narrow wooden walkway flanked by teal neon pillars and a graffiti-covered concrete wall, where heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on the planks. As the camera moves forward past a leaning NPC, the scene opens up to reveal a wide stone stairway leading upward into the city. The camera then turns left to ascend these stairs, passing a character in a yellow jacket while modern glass buildings with neon accents emerge above. Finally, upon reaching the top, the environment shifts from urban concrete to a darker, atmospheric walkway enclosed by dense vegetation, large trees, and rock formations.
